TEXT.source: NTU Corpus stories for Amis, story: Amis_Nr-intro_ofad
TEXT.citation: Sung, L. M., Lily, I., Hsieh, F., & Lin, Z. (2008). Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages. Taiwan Journal of Linguistics, 6(2.).
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @article{sung2008developing,title={Developing an online corpus of Formosan languages.},author={Sung, Li-May and Lily, I and Hsieh, Fuhui and Lin, Zhemin and others},journal={Taiwan Journal of Linguistics},volume={6},number={2},year={2008}}

S.FORM: nga'ayho.
S.PHON: ŋaʡajħo~u.
S.FORM: nga'ayho.
S.PHON: ŋaʡajħo~u.
S.TRANSL: 大家好.
Hello.

S.FORM: ci Ofad Kacaw ku ngangan aku.
S.PHON: ʦi o~ufaɬ~ɮ kaʦaw ku ŋaŋan aku.
S.FORM: ci Ofad Kacaw ku ngangan aku.
S.PHON: ʦi o~ufaɬ~ɮ kaʦaw ku ŋaŋan aku.
S.TRANSL: 我的名字是Ofad Kacaw.
My name is Ofad Kacaw.

S.FORM: u niyaro' aku itira i pusun i kakacawan ku ciwkangan.
S.PHON: u nijaro~uʡ aku itira i pusun i kakaʦawan ku ʦiwkaŋan.
S.FORM: u niyaro' aku itira i pusun i kakacawan ku ciwkangan.
S.PHON: u nijaro~uʡ aku itira i pusun i kakaʦawan ku ʦiwkaŋan.
S.TRANSL: 我的故鄉在台東長濱長光.
My hometown is in Ciwkangan, in Taitung, in Kakacawan.

S.FORM: na nu emang ku X itira i ciwkangan a matuas tahira i tulu ku safaw nu mihecaan.
S.PHON: na nu əmaŋ ku x itira i ʦiwkaŋan a matuas taħira i tuɾu ku safaw nu miħəʦaan.
S.FORM: na nu emang ku X itira i ciwkangan a matuas tahira i tulu ku safaw nu mihecaan.
S.PHON: na nu əmaŋ ku x itira i ʦiwkaŋan a matuas taħira i tuɾu ku safaw nu miħəʦaan.
S.TRANSL: 我從小就在長光部落長大,一直到十三歲.
I grew up in Ciwkangan until I was thirteen.

S.FORM: miliad tu luma' tayra i heto a mitilid tahiratu i kokiw maherek misawadtu itira.
S.PHON: miɾiaɬ~ɮ tu ɾumaʡ tajra i ħəto~u a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ taħiratu i ko~ukiw maħərək misawaɬ~ɮtu itira.
S.FORM: miliad tu luma' tayra i heto a mitilid tahiratu i kokiw maherek misawadtu itira.
S.PHON: miɾiaɬ~ɮ tu ɾumaʡ tajra i ħəto~u a mitiɾiɬ~ɮ taħiratu i ko~ukiw maħərək misawaɬ~ɮtu itira.

TRANSL.notes: (我)離開家到屏東讀書,一直到高中畢業以後.

S.TRANSL: 離開家到屏東讀書,一直到高中畢業以後.

TRANSL.notes: (I) left home and went to Pingtung to study until I graduated from high school.

S.TRANSL: left home and went to Pingtung to study until I graduated from high school.

S.FORM: mi harakattu tu sakalahitai.
S.PHON: mi ħarakattu tu sakaɾaħitai.
S.FORM: mi harakattu tu sakalahitai.
S.PHON: mi ħarakattu tu sakaɾaħitai.
S.TRANSL: 我準備當兵.
I was about to serve in the army.

S.FORM: maheraktu a malahitai u sasuwal nu matuasay maedengtu kisu u fahinayantu kisu.
S.PHON: maħəraktu a maɾaħitai u sasuwaɾ nu matuasaj maəɬ~ɮəŋtu kisu u faħinajantu kisu.
S.FORM: maheraktu a malahitai u sasuwal nu matuasay maedengtu kisu u fahinayantu kisu.
S.PHON: maħəraktu a maɾaħitai u sasuwaɾ nu matuasaj maəɬ~ɮəŋtu kisu u faħinajantu kisu.
S.TRANSL: 退伍以後,老人家說,「你可以了.你已經是成年男子了.」
After finishing the military service, the elderly said,'You have become a grown-up man.'

S.FORM: maedengtu kisu cifafahi' sa'an saka.
S.PHON: maəɬ~ɮəŋtu kisu ʦifafaħiʡ saʡan saka.
S.FORM: maedengtu kisu cifafahi' sa'an saka.
S.PHON: maəɬ~ɮəŋtu kisu ʦifafaħiʡ saʡan saka.
S.TRANSL: 「你可以結婚了.」
'You can marry now.'

S.FORM: itiya u roma miheca cifafahi'tu kaku.
S.PHON: itija u ro~uma miħəʦa ʦifafaħiʡtu kaku.
S.FORM: itiya u roma miheca cifafahi'tu kaku.
S.PHON: itija u ro~uma miħəʦa ʦifafaħiʡtu kaku.
S.TRANSL: 因此,隔年,我就結婚了.
Then, I got married the following year.

S.FORM: maherek cifafahi' kaku tangsul sa tayni i taypak.
S.PHON: maħərək ʦifafaħiʡ kaku taŋsuɾ sa tajni i tajpak.
S.FORM: maherek cifafahi' kaku tangsul sa tayni i taypak.
S.PHON: maħərək ʦifafaħiʡ kaku taŋsuɾ sa tajni i tajpak.
S.TRANSL: 我結婚之後沒多久就到台北.
After I got married, I came to Taipei immediately.

S.FORM: itini i taypak i anu saosien ku mihecaan itira i enem polo' ira ku saka tulu.
S.PHON: itini i tajpak i anu sao~usiən ku miħəʦaan itira i ənəm po~uɾo~uʡ ira ku saka tuɾu.
S.FORM: itini i taypak i anu saosien ku mihecaan itira i enem polo' ira ku saka tulu.
S.PHON: itini i tajpak i anu sao~usiən ku miħəʦaan itira i ənəm po~uɾo~uʡ ira ku saka tuɾu.
S.TRANSL: 在台北算算年份,是在民國六十三年.

TRANSL.notes: It was around 1974 (when I came) to Taipei.

S.TRANSL: It was around 1974 to Taipei.

S.FORM: malumed aca ku katayni aku i taypak.
S.PHON: maɾuməɬ~ɮ aʦa ku katajni aku i tajpak.
S.FORM: malumed aca ku katayni aku i taypak.
S.PHON: maɾuməɬ~ɮ aʦa ku katajni aku i tajpak.
S.TRANSL: 我到台北來運氣非常好.
I felt lucky to have come to Taipei.

S.FORM: roma miheca tangsul kaku mi misikin tu nu pakayni i hikociw a sikin saka itira kaku i matayal tah tahira anini.
S.PHON: ro~uma miħəʦa taŋsuɾ kaku mi misikin tu nu pakajni i ħiko~uʦiw a sikin saka itira kaku i matajaɾ taħ taħira anini.
S.FORM: roma miheca tangsul kaku mi misikin tu nu pakayni i hikociw a sikin saka itira kaku i matayal tah tahira anini.
S.PHON: ro~uma miħəʦa taŋsuɾ kaku mi misikin tu nu pakajni i ħiko~uʦiw a sikin saka itira kaku i matajaɾ taħ taħira anini.
S.TRANSL: 我隔年馬上參加航空站考試,在那邊服務一直到現在.
The following year I immediately took an examination for a job at an airport; I am still working there now.

S.FORM: tulutu polo' ku mihecaan ku tayal aku itira.
S.PHON: tuɾutu po~uɾo~uʡ ku miħəʦaan ku tajaɾ aku itira.
S.FORM: tulutu polo' ku mihecaan ku tayal aku itira.
S.PHON: tuɾutu po~uɾo~uʡ ku miħəʦaan ku tajaɾ aku itira.
S.TRANSL: 我在那邊工作已經三十年了.
I have worked there for thirty years.

S.FORM: tuninian a tayal nu maku pakayniay tu nu pancah itira i saka pitu polo' mihecaan sa ira ku lima.
S.PHON: tuninian a tajaɾ nu maku pakajniaj tu nu panʦaħ itira i saka pitu po~uɾo~uʡ miħəʦaan sa ira ku ɾima.
S.FORM: tuninian a tayal nu maku pakayniay tu nu pancah itira i saka pitu polo' mihecaan sa ira ku lima.
S.PHON: tuninian a tajaɾ nu maku pakajniaj tu nu panʦaħ itira i saka pitu po~uɾo~uʡ miħəʦaan sa ira ku ɾima.
S.TRANSL: 我從事阿美族語的工作,是在七十五年.
It is in 1986 that I engaged in the work on Amis.

S.FORM: malumed kaku itiya ira ci Afan a singsi.
S.PHON: maɾuməɬ~ɮ kaku itija ira ʦi afan a siŋsi.
S.FORM: malumed kaku itiya ira ci Afan a singsi.
S.PHON: maɾuməɬ~ɮ kaku itija ira ʦi afan a siŋsi.

TRANSL.notes: 那一年我很幸運,認識了Afan(方敏英)老師.

S.TRANSL: 那一年我很幸運,認識了Afan 老師.
I was lucky to meet Professor Afan.

S.FORM: misanga' kaku tu citen nu pancah sa'an ku suwal nira saka.
S.PHON: misaŋaʡ kaku tu ʦitən nu panʦaħ saʡan ku suwaɾ nira saka.
S.FORM: misanga' kaku tu citen nu pancah sa'an ku suwal nira saka.
S.PHON: misaŋaʡ kaku tu ʦitən nu panʦaħ saʡan ku suwaɾ nira saka.
S.TRANSL: 他說:「我要製作阿美語的字典.」
'I am going to compile an Amis dictionary,' he said.

S.FORM: mikilimay tu mami falic tu tilid nu pancah malu mifalic sa nu holam.
S.PHON: mikiɾimaj tu mami faɾiʦ tu tiɾiɬ~ɮ nu panʦaħ maɾu mifaɾiʦ sa nu ħo~uɾam.
S.FORM: mikilimay tu mami falic tu tilid nu pancah malu mifalic sa nu holam.
S.PHON: mikiɾimaj tu mami faɾiʦ tu tiɾiɬ~ɮ nu panʦaħ maɾu mifaɾiʦ sa nu ħo~uɾam.
S.TRANSL: 他在找一位把翻譯阿美語的書翻成漢語的人.
He is looking for someone to translate Amis into Chinese.

S.FORM: saka mitayalay kaku itiya.
S.PHON: saka mitajaɾaj kaku itija.
S.FORM: saka mitayalay kaku itiya.
S.PHON: saka mitajaɾaj kaku itija.
S.TRANSL: 所以我在那個時候工作.
Therefore I accepted the job then.

S.FORM: sarakat aku micamul a mitayal tu tilid nu pancah itiya.
S.PHON: sarakat aku miʦamuɾ a mitajaɾ tu tiɾiɬ~ɮ nu panʦaħ itija.
S.FORM: sarakat aku micamul a mitayal tu tilid nu pancah itiya.
S.PHON: sarakat aku miʦamuɾ a mitajaɾ tu tiɾiɬ~ɮ nu panʦaħ itija.
S.TRANSL: 在那個時候我首次參與阿美語文的工作.
It was the first time that I participated in the work on the Amis language.

S.FORM: ta mafana' kakutu ka tada kafangcal ku tilid nu pancah.
S.PHON: ta mafanaʡ kakutu ka taɬ~ɮa kafaŋʦaɾ ku tiɾiɬ~ɮ nu panʦaħ.
S.FORM: ta mafana' kakutu ka tada kafangcal ku tilid nu pancah.
S.PHON: ta mafanaʡ kakutu ka taɬ~ɮa kafaŋʦaɾ ku tiɾiɬ~ɮ nu panʦaħ.
S.TRANSL: 從那時我才知道阿美語文非常的優美.
From then on, I realized that the Amis language is beautiful.

S.FORM: u caciaw nu pancah u facu nu pancah mae'min a fangcal.
S.PHON: u ʦaʦiaw nu panʦaħ u faʦu nu panʦaħ maəʡmin a faŋʦaɾ.
S.FORM: u caciaw nu pancah u facu nu pancah mae'min a fangcal.
S.PHON: u ʦaʦiaw nu panʦaħ u faʦu nu panʦaħ maəʡmin a faŋʦaɾ.
S.TRANSL: 阿美語和它的結構,全部都優美.
The speech and the structure of the Amis language are all beautiful.

S.FORM: saka itiya satu kaku minengneng manga'ay kini parayrayen ku tilid nu pancah.
S.PHON: saka itija satu kaku minəŋnəŋ maŋaʡaj kini parajrajən ku tiɾiɬ~ɮ nu panʦaħ.
S.FORM: saka itiya satu kaku minengneng manga'ay kini parayrayen ku tilid nu pancah.
S.PHON: saka itija satu kaku minəŋnəŋ maŋaʡaj kini parajrajən ku tiɾiɬ~ɮ nu panʦaħ.
S.TRANSL: 所以從那個時候,我發覺可以將阿美語的文字傳承下去.
Therefore, I realized that it was good to preserve the Amis language.

S.FORM: sa'an ku falucu' aku itiya.
S.PHON: saʡan ku faɾuʦuʡ aku itija.
S.FORM: sa'an ku falucu' aku itiya.
S.PHON: saʡan ku faɾuʦuʡ aku itija.
S.TRANSL: 當時我是如此想的.
That was what I thought then.

S.FORM: roma miheca tayratu kaku i yanjiuyuan a matayaltu mialaay tu ngiha' nu matuasayho.
S.PHON: ro~uma miħəʦa tajratu kaku i janjiujuan a matajaɾtu miaɾaaj tu ŋiħaʡ nu matuasajħo~u.
S.FORM: roma miheca tayratu kaku i yanjiuyuan a matayaltu mialaay tu ngiha' nu matuasayho.
S.PHON: ro~uma miħəʦa tajratu kaku i janjiujuan a matajaɾtu miaɾaaj tu ŋiħaʡ nu matuasajħo~u.
S.TRANSL: 隔年我到了研究院工作,去採集老人家的口述.
The following year, I went to Academia Sinica to work and collect elders' speech.

S.FORM: nawhani u orip nu pancah awa'ay ku tilid.
S.PHON: nawħani u o~urip nu panʦaħ awaʡaj ku tiɾiɬ~ɮ.
S.FORM: nawhani u orip nu pancah awa'ay ku tilid.
S.PHON: nawħani u o~urip nu panʦaħ awaʡaj ku tiɾiɬ~ɮ.
S.TRANSL: 因為阿美族文化裡,沒有文字.
Because there was no written language in Amis culture.

S.FORM: awa'ay ku suwal saka itinitini aca i kimad nu pancah a miala ta ma fana' tu orip nu pancah itiyaho tahira sa anini.
S.PHON: awaʡaj ku suwaɾ saka itinitini aʦa i kimaɬ~ɮ nu panʦaħ a miaɾa ta ma fanaʡ tu o~urip nu panʦaħ itijaħo~u taħira sa anini.
S.FORM: awa'ay ku suwal saka itinitini aca i kimad nu pancah a miala ta ma fana' tu orip nu pancah itiyaho tahira sa anini.
S.PHON: awaʡaj ku suwaɾ saka itinitini aʦa i kimaɬ~ɮ nu panʦaħ a miaɾa ta ma fanaʡ tu o~urip nu panʦaħ itijaħo~u taħira sa anini.
S.TRANSL: 僅僅能透過口述採集,才知道阿美族的文化,從古至今.
Only by collecting Amis narratives could we learn about the Amis culture in the past and present.

S.FORM: tahira i falu polo' mihecaan i mi harakattu ku sefu nu mita tu pakayniay i doumi duoyuanwenhuajiaoyu hananay saka.
S.PHON: taħira i faɾu po~uɾo~uʡ miħəʦaan i mi ħarakattu ku səfu nu mita tu pakajniaj i ɬ~ɮo~uumi ɬ~ɮuo~ujuanwənħuajiao~uju ħananaj saka.
S.FORM: tahira i falu polo' mihecaan i mi harakattu ku sefu nu mita tu pakayniay i doumi duoyuanwenhuajiaoyu hananay saka.
S.PHON: taħira i faɾu po~uɾo~uʡ miħəʦaan i mi ħarakattu ku səfu nu mita tu pakajniaj i ɬ~ɮo~uumi ɬ~ɮuo~ujuanwənħuajiao~uju ħananaj saka.
S.TRANSL: 到了八十年,我們政府開始實施多元文化教育.
In the 90s, the government started multi-cultural education.

S.FORM: malasingsitu kaku tu nu pancah.
S.PHON: maɾasiŋsitu kaku tu nu panʦaħ.
S.FORM: malasingsitu kaku tu nu pancah.
S.PHON: maɾasiŋsitu kaku tu nu panʦaħ.
S.TRANSL: 所以那時候我當了阿美語老師.
Therefore I became an Amis teacher.

S.FORM: mikinkiw mikadkadtu kaku tu tilid tahira i falu polo' enem ku mihecaan.
S.PHON: mikinkiw mikaɬ~ɮkaɬ~ɮtu kaku tu tiɾiɬ~ɮ taħira i faɾu po~uɾo~uʡ ənəm ku miħəʦaan.
S.FORM: mikinkiw mikadkadtu kaku tu tilid tahira i falu polo' enem ku mihecaan.
S.PHON: mikinkiw mikaɬ~ɮkaɬ~ɮtu kaku tu tiɾiɬ~ɮ taħira i faɾu po~uɾo~uʡ ənəm ku miħəʦaan.
S.TRANSL: 我研究探討文字直到八十六年.

S.FORM: haenhan ku pasifana' tu wawa ca'ay ka reko saka.
S.PHON: ħaənħan ku pasifanaʡ tu wawa ʦaʡaj ka rəko~u saka.
S.FORM: haenhan ku pasifana' tu wawa ca'ay ka reko saka.
S.PHON: ħaənħan ku pasifanaʡ tu wawa ʦaʡaj ka rəko~u saka.
S.TRANSL: 如此教育小孩,不充實.
This way of teaching children is not good enough.

S.FORM: tuya miheca misanga kaku tu cudad malu cudad nu pasifana' tu wawa.
S.PHON: tuja miħəʦa misaŋa kaku tu ʦuɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ maɾu ʦuɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ nu pasifanaʡ tu wawa.
S.FORM: tuya miheca misanga kaku tu cudad malu cudad nu pasifana' tu wawa.
S.PHON: tuja miħəʦa misaŋa kaku tu ʦuɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ maɾu ʦuɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮ nu pasifanaʡ tu wawa.
S.TRANSL: 所以那一年我出版了一本書,作為教小孩用的書.
Thus I published a book that year, as teaching materials for children.

S.FORM: saka tahanini sa ku tayal nu maku tu pakayniay tu nu pancah.
S.PHON: saka taħanini sa ku tajaɾ nu maku tu pakajniaj tu nu panʦaħ.
S.FORM: saka tahanini sa ku tayal nu maku tu pakayniay tu nu pancah.
S.PHON: saka taħanini sa ku tajaɾ nu maku tu pakajniaj tu nu panʦaħ.
S.TRANSL: 所以我從事阿美語文工作一直到現在.
Thus I worked on the Amis language up till now.
